cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure this out. So the question is asking between what times could Richard have gone to the bakery. The bakery is closed after 7pm, so his visit must be before 7pm. Let's look at the timeline of events. First, Richard woke up at 8am. So he's up from 8am onwards. Then, Betty saw him at the library from 9am to 2pm. So between 9am and 2pm, he's at the library. Then David saw him at the electronic store fixing a computer from 2pm to 4pm. After that, Mary saw him taking photos near the Eiffel Tower from 4pm to 5pm. Then Hannah saw him on a rooftop from 5pm to 6pm. Susan saw him driving to the water park from 6pm to 7pm. So the bakery was closed after 7pm, so he must have gone before that. But we need to see when he was free. Let's break down the times: - 8am: Wakes up. - 9am-2pm: At library. - 2pm-4pm: At electronic store. - 4pm-5pm: Taking photos. - 5pm-6pm: On rooftop. - 6pm-7pm: Driving to water park. So between 8am and 9am, he was waking up, probably getting ready. Then he's at the library until 2pm.
